title: Storage Drawers Unofficial
description: A fork of Storage Drawers for Minecraft 1.7.10 with better compatibility and new features.
body:
A fork of Storage Drawers for 1.7.10 with bug fixes, compatibility patches, and additional content.

Differences from original Storage Drawers:
- Support for multi-threaded rendering when installed alongside Angelica
- All storage drawers addon packs are merged into the single mod. This includes the Natura, Biomes O Plenty, Forestry, Erebus, and Misc packs. These can be enabled/disabled via the config file for the mod. All of them but the Misc pack can also be configured to be loaded automatically if the accompanying mod is present
- Better compatibility with the GTNH version of Applied Energistics 2
- Quality of life improvements such as the ability to remove items from locked drawers without needing to unlock the drawer.

As well as numerous bug fixes and duplication glitch fixes, and actively supported maintenance for 1.7.10.
